english_text: I need to go back to South Korea
I'll protect you no matter what
I didn't expect to fall in love
Even if the world is against us
I won't give up on us
I don't want to say goodbye
Will I ever see you again?
I'll find a way back to you
The people there were so kind
Love is the most important thing
I'd cross any border for you
Our love story is like a drama
I'd do it all again for you
We wrote our own love story
And they lived happily ever after
No border can keep us apart
korean_text: 어떤 국경도 우리를 갈라놓을 수 없어
romanization: eotteon gukgyeongdo urireul gallanoeul su eopseo

english_text: Our love is stronger than any wall
